title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, August 16 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 16/08/2022
Image reference: 2022-08-16_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-august-16-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker values have softened, driven by a softening in earnings. Diana Shipping has acquired 9 Ultramax Vessels (between 60,300 & 60,500 DWT, Aug 2015 to November 2018, Mitsui Tamano & Japan Marine United) for a total of USD 330 mil (comprised of USD 220 mil cash and USD 110 mil shares), VV en bloc value USD 282 mil. Supramax Zhong Liang Dong Nan (52,600 DWT, Apr 2001, Shin Kurushima Onishi) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 11.59 mil, VV Value USD 11.46 mil - SS Due.
